name: Bright Data
what_it_does: Provides enterprise-grade proxy networks (residential, datacenter, ISP, mobile) and managed web scraping APIs for large-scale data collection.
use_cases: Route scraping requests through residential IP proxies to avoid geo-blocks and bot detection
Use the Web Scraper API to extract structured data from major e-commerce and social platforms at scale
Purchase pre-collected datasets for markets, jobs, or social data without running scrapers
Collect pricing intelligence from competitor websites using rotating proxies with location targeting
Power search engine result page (SERP) monitoring agents with reliable, geo-targeted proxy access
not_for: Simple single-URL screenshot capture without needing proxy infrastructure
Low-volume scraping where a direct HTTP client is sufficient
best_when: You need to scrape at high volume across geo-distributed targets with bot-detection avoidance and residential IP coverage.
avoid_when: Your scraping needs are low-volume, single-region, or don't require residential IP diversity.

auth.notes: Proxy access uses username:password credentials embedded in proxy URL; API management uses API tokens; per-zone credentials available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial credits available on signup; no ongoing free tier for proxy bandwidth
pricing.paid_tiers: Residential proxies from ~$8.4/GB; datacenter proxies from ~$0.9/GB; Scraper APIs from ~$1.5/1,000 requests; enterprise contracts available
pricing.notes: Pricing is complex with multiple products (proxy types, scraper APIs, datasets); bandwidth-based billing for proxies.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrency scales with plan; no hard request rate limits but bandwidth is metered

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Proxy errors often manifest as connection timeouts or 407s rather than descriptive API errors; Scraper API errors are more descriptive.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Proxy and scraping operations are read-only; retrying failed requests is safe and encouraged.
known_agent_gotchas: Proxy credentials are zone-specific; using the wrong zone credentials silently routes through unintended proxy pools
Bandwidth overages are billed automatically; agents with runaway retry loops can incur large unexpected charges
Residential proxy latency is highly variable (500ms to 30s+) due to peer network nature; agents must use generous timeouts
The Scraper API and raw proxy products have separate credential systems and separate billing; easy to confuse in agent configuration
Some target websites implement fingerprinting beyond IP; residential proxies alone may not be sufficient without additional browser stealth

security_score_components.security_notes: Proxy credentials embedded in URLs are a security risk if logged; use environment variables; SOC2 certified; ethical use policies enforced; residential proxy use must comply with terms.
